title: cyperus sesquiflorus f. elongatus
intro: Cyperus sesquiflorus f. elongatus is a variant of the Cyperus sesquiflorus plant, commonly known as umbrella sedge or papyrus sedge. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Cyperus sesquiflorus f. elongatus include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system, among others. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, and its extracts have also been used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
